# NIP-48 Reference Card

NIP-48 introduces the "proxy" tag for Nostr events bridged from other protocols. The tag format is ["proxy", <id>, <protocol>], where <id> is the source object ID and <protocol> is the protocol name (e.g., "activitypub"). Supported protocols include activitypub, atproto, rss, and web, with varying ID formats (URL, AT URI, URL with guid fragment, and URL respectively). Example: {"kind": 1, "content": "I'm vegan btw", "tags": [["proxy", "https://gleasonator.com/objects/8f6fac53-4f66-4c6e-ac7d-92e5e78c3e79", "activitypub"]]}.

---
